mapper.update: UPDATE excerpts SET note = #{note}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.dynasty AS poem_dynasty, p.author AS poem_author, p.content AS poem_content, p.tags AS poem_tags FROM excerpts e LEFT JOIN poems p ON p.id = e.poem_id WHERE e.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.dynasty AS poem_dynasty, p.author AS poem_author, p.content AS poem_content, p.tags AS poem_tags FROM excerpts e LEFT JOIN poems p ON p.id = e.poem_id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
